Nodes.QuickReplyTitle: Good day! Thank you for reaching out to us via Digital Support Center.  How can I help you? Please select on the topics below:
QuickReplies: 1. Account sign in
2. Hardware issue
3. Software issue
4. Service
5. Others

Nodes.QuickReplyTitle: 1. What seems to be the problem here?
QuickReplies: 1. How do I get started on the Digital Help Desk?
2. How can I get an account password to sign in to the Digital Support Center?

Nodes.Value: How can I get an account password to sign in to the Digital Support Center?

Nodes.OutputValue:
You may use your company-registered email address as username and password to access the System.
For example: USERNAME: hana@kulim.com.my PASSWORD: ******

Please type 'help' to start or contact 
ICT Helpdesk for assistance.

The hardware issue includes the physical parts of a 
computer, such as a case, central processing unit (CPU), 
random access memory (RAM), monitor, mouse, 
keyboard, computer data storage, graphics card, sound 
card, speakers, earphone, Tablet, Phone, note pad, 
physical Server, Laptops router, modem, and motherboard.

Nodes.Value: Service

Nodes.OutputValue:
In a broad sense, services interact with users. This 
happens through support channels like the Digital 
Support Centre. Thus, they can resolve users’ issues 
quickly and effectively by the response according to 
indicated issues.
Hello. I hope you have a nice day. Please type 'help' to start.

Nodes.Value: Others

Nodes.OutputValue:
If you have problems accessing the Digital Support Centre
 kindly contact a response line for assistance.

Nodes.Value: Do you know Anis Adzizee?

Nodes.OutputValue:
Of course I know him. 
He is my master.

Nodes.Value: How do I get started on the Digital Help Desk?

Nodes.OutputValue:
We are glad to inform you that you are able to access the Digital Support Centre (DSC) 
by URL Link http://dsc.kulim.com.my/Default.aspx at any internet web browser.

Nodes.Value: KPLANT

Nodes.QuickReplyTitle: Select one of the following questions:
QuickReplies: What is the purpose of KPLANT system?
How to access the KPLANT System?
How do I request for user account?
What are the modules in KPLANT?
How to get QR code for workers in KPLANT?
How to get QR code for scanner user?
How to setup gang for contractor?
How to add or setup new field and block?
Is it possible to repair the defective device?
Can a user create a new codes for deductions and allowances in their checkroll?

Nodes.Value: What is the purpose of KPLANT system?

Nodes.OutputValue:
This system is a Plantation software serves 
multiple purposes in the management of 
plantations such as plantation data management, 
crop planning and monitoring, Yield Performance 
Analysis and wages calculation for workers.

Nodes.Value: How to access the KPLANT System?

Nodes.OutputValue:
To access the system, go to url 
http://kplant.kulim.com.my.

Nodes.Value: How do I request for user account?

Nodes.OutputValue:
To request for user account please submit new 
DSC ticket from Digital Support Centre.

Nodes.Value: What are the modules in KPLANT?

StringList: Here are the modules in KPLANT:

Nodes.Value: How to get QR code for workers in KPLANT?

Nodes.OutputValue:
To get QR code for workers, register the 
workers in KPLANT Checkroll> Master 
Setup> Employee master. Setup gang for 
the workers. Go to Kplant Harvesting >
Template Generation> Employee ID badge.

Nodes.Value: How to get QR code for scanner user?

Nodes.OutputValue:
To get QR code for scanner user, ensure the has 
been registered in KPLANT Harvesting> Employee 
information. Go to KPLANT Harvesting>Master setup> 
Scanner user and enter the information.

Nodes.Value: How to setup gang for contractor?

Nodes.OutputValue:
To setup gang contractor in KPLANT, 
please submit new DSC ticket from Digital 
Support Centre.

Nodes.Value: How to add or setup new field and block?

Nodes.OutputValue:
To add new field , go to KPLANT Checkroll> Master setup> 
Field master> Enter field information.  To add new block, 
KPLANT Checkroll> Master setup> Block master> Select 
field and enter block master information. The new field 
and block created will be reflect into KPLANT Harvesting, 
field profile screen.

Nodes.Value: Is it possible to repair the defective device?

Nodes.OutputValue:
Yes, it is often possible to fix a defective device 
depending on the nature of the problem. Please 
submit new DSC ticket from Digital Support Centre. 
We may provide you with additional troubleshooting 
steps or guidance specific to your device. We will 
also determine of the issue can be fixed remotely or 
may require send the device to our HQ office.

Nodes.Value: Can a user create a new codes for deductions and allowances in their checkroll?

Nodes.OutputValue:
No, user are not allow to create any allowances and 
deductions code. Please submit a DSC ticket through 
the Digital Support Centre, and an Administrator will 
assist you in creating the approved allowance and 
deductions code.

This ERP JD Edwards 9.2 & 8,2 system 
is a financial management system for 
Mill and Estate

Nodes.Value: How to access the JD Edwards System?

Nodes.OutputValue:
To access the system, go to the Microsoft Edge 
internet browser and use the URL as follow:
http://kulimjde02:100/jde/E1Menu.maf?jdeLoginAction=LOGOUT&RENDER_MAFLET=E1Menu

Nodes.Value: What are JDE frequently asked questions?

Nodes.QuickReplyTitle: Select one of the following JDE issues:
QuickReplies: Unable to sign in Enterprise one JD Edwards. Sign-in failure with error message: Please contact the system administrator.
Unable to proceed with the transaction. The transaction loading is too long/nonstop progress or message like R09801 your report has NOT been submitted successfully?
The report In the JDE system is unable to open or queue for too long or cannot be generated.
All JDE transactions cannot post to GL.
How to backup while the backup appears not running / Auto daily backup inactive.
Request the password due to a new PC / Formatted PC and forgetting the password.
How about if the JDE system cannot perform a backup either before closing, after closing or daily backup?

Nodes.Value: Unable to sign in Enterprise one JD Edwards. Sign-in failure with error message: Please contact the system administrator.

Nodes.OutputValue:
To request a user account, please submit a new 
DSC ticket from Digital Support Centre. First-level 
technical support will check the due to sign-in 
failure.

Nodes.Value: Unable to proceed with the transaction. The transaction loading is too long/nonstop progress or message like R09801 your report has NOT been submitted successfully?

Nodes.OutputValue:
Please indicate the error first and write it before 
submitting a new DSC ticket from Digital Support 
Centre and the system administrator will give 
assistance.

Nodes.Value: The report In the JDE system is unable to open or queue for too long or cannot be generated.

Nodes.OutputValue:
For these issues, might require a DBA to 
check the system, especially in the database. 
To request support, please submit a new 
DSC ticket from Digital Support Centre.

Nodes.Value: All JDE transactions cannot post to GL.

Nodes.OutputValue:
For this issue, might require a DBA 
to check the system first, especially in 
the database area. To request support, 
please submit a new DSC ticket from 
Digital Support Centre.

Nodes.Value: How to backup while the backup appears not running / Auto daily backup inactive.

Nodes.OutputValue:
Please check the physical drive free space. 
If the drive were full it will turn to red colour 
if not you may further the new DSC ticket 
from Digital Support Centre and the system 
administrator will support you remotely.

Nodes.Value: Request the password due to a new PC / Formatted PC and forgetting the password.

Nodes.OutputValue:
Users has to check the record of the password on 
the slip of username and password that is 
provided to the Chief Clerk if still cannot, please 
submit a new DSC ticket from Digital Support 
Centre.

Nodes.Value: How about if the JDE system cannot perform a backup either before closing, after closing or daily backup?

Nodes.OutputValue:
Please indicate the error first and write 
it before submitting a new DSC ticket 
from Digital Support Centre.

connect with the global protect> remote the 
Desktop connection ( 172.19.80.191) > and 
click the perspective

Nodes.Value: How to connect to IBM Cognos TM1 Perspective?

Double click the perspective> explorer> 
TM1 > Kulim > and insert the username 
and password > click OK

Nodes.QuickReplyTitle: Select one of the following questions/Issues:
QuickReplies: How to install the OMP 10.2 system on a laptop or PC?
Cannot open OMP application.
Error message: We are unable to import the harvesting round-length column with float number.
Error ODBC
Cannot open the report in Excel / PDF OMP system unable to export Excel form.

Nodes.Value: How to install the OMP 10.2 system on a laptop or PC?

Nodes.OutputValue:
To request this installation please 
submit a new DSC ticket from 
Digital Support Centre.

Nodes.Value: Cannot open the OMP application.

Nodes.OutputValue:
Please check and ensure the VPN is 
enabled first, this issue is only if the 
user tries to access from outside the 
office network area like at home etc.
Also, check the network connection.

ExpressionList: Error message: We are unable to import the harvesting round-length column with float number.

StringList: Please indicate the error first and write it before submitting a new DSC ticket from Digital Support Centre.
The OMP system should close properly and please don’t leave it without closing properly when accessing the remote to the OMP system.

Nodes.Value: Cannot open the report in Excel / PDF OMP system unable to export Excel form.

Nodes.OutputValue:
Please try to close the system currently being open 
and open it again. If the report still exists with an 
error please indicate the error first and write it 
before submitting a new DSC ticket from Digital 
Support Centre

Nodes.Value: What is the purpose of KULIM BIS system?

Nodes.OutputValue:
The KULIM Breeding Information System (KULIM BIS) was 
designed to manage oil palm breeding data efficiently, 
allowing for more systematic integration and sharing of 
data from different sites.
